module.name: StaticContentSample
module.param: **WARNING*** THIS VIEW MAY TAKE A LONG TIME TO LOAD. This view rebuilds your XenDesktop lookup table, overwriting the existing file, using the sourcetype=vdi:xendesktop:*:desktop sourcetype. This view is typically only used on first time run.

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: |table vm_name AgentVersion ApplicationsInUse AssignedClientName AssignedIPAddress AssociatedUserFullNames AssociatedUserNames AssociatedUserUPNs AutonomouslyBrokered CatalogKind CatalogName CatalogUid ClientAddress ClientName ClientVersion ColorDepth ConnectedViaHostName ConnectedViaIP ControllerDNSName DNSName Description DesktopConditions DesktopGroupName DesktopGroupUid DesktopKind DeviceId HardwareId HostedMachineId HostedMachineName HostingServerName HypervisorConnectionName HypervisorConnectionUid IPAddress IconUid ImageOutOfDate InMaintenanceMode IsAssigned LastConnectionFailure LastConnectionTime LastConnectionUser LastDeregistrationReason LastDeregistrationTime LastHostingUpdateTime LaunchedViaHostName LaunchedViaIP LicenseId MachineName MachineUid OSType OSVersion PowerActionPending PowerState Protocol PublishedApplications PublishedName RegistrationState SecureIcaActive SecureIcaRequired SessionId SessionState SessionStateChangeTime SessionUid SessionUserName SessionUserSID SID SmartAccessTags StartTime SummaryState Tags Uid WillShutdownAfterUse
